query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] Worktrees already clean. **Stewardship review**: Entry #3723 is high-quality — has what/root-cause/fix with specific implementation guidance (post-rayon insertion point, nearest-rank formula, private helper pattern). Keep.

**Phase 2: Pattern & Procedure Extraction**

```
RETROSPECTIVE BRIEFING for bugfix-439
======================================

Session stats: 2 sessions, 464 records, ~4h 14m (3.7h was idle gap), 5 stored

HOTSPOTS (9 total — 5 warnings):
- [warning] cold_restart: 219-min gap → 4 re-reads of nli_detection_tick.rs, status.rs (session resumption artifact)
- [warning] context_load: 120 KB loaded before first write — 3 clusters (investigator + tester reading widely)
- [warning] compile_cycles: 26 compile/check cycles in testing phase (10 clusters)
- [warning] tool_failure_hotspot: context_get failed 13×, Read failed 6× (pre-existing integer serialization bug in context_get MCP tool)
- [warning] session_timeout: 3.7h gap
- [info] reread_rate: 13 files re-read (session gap artifact)
- [info] output_parsing_struggle: clippy output piped through 7 filters
- [info] search_via_bash: 8.5% bash calls are search (8/94)
- [info] sleep_workarounds: 2 sleep calls

BASELINE OUTLIERS (positive only — no negative outliers):
- permission_friction_events: 0.0 vs mean 16.0 — well below (positive)
- bash_for_search_count: 46.0 vs mean 152.4 — good Grep/Glob discipline
- coordinator_respawn_count: 0.0 vs mean 1.1 — clean SM lifetime
- post_completion_work_pct: 0.0 vs mean 4.4 — clean stop

RECOMMENDATIONS FROM RETROSPECTIVE:
- [sleep_workarounds] Use run_in_background + TaskOutput instead of sleep polling
- [compile_cycles] Batch field additions before compiling — complete type definitions before each build

REWORK SIGNALS: None. Zero gate failures. No rework commits.
```
[tool: Bash(git worktree list && ls .claude/worktrees/ 2>&1) → /workspaces/unimatrix  9e2c769 [main]]

=== End recent conversation ===
